entities.name: Vrijen
entities.context: Speaker presenting closing argument on talent wars and future of work

entities.name: Talent Wars
entities.context: Competition for talent as labor supply shrinks, analogous to resource wars

entities.name: Future of Work
entities.context: Macro framework for how employment dynamics are shifting

entities.name: Shrinking Labor Supply
entities.context: Demographic trend driving increased employee bargaining power

entities.name: Employee Power Concentration
entities.context: Belief that employees will gain athlete-like leverage as talent becomes scarce

entities.name: Talent Tools
entities.context: New tools needed to address talent acquisition in competitive landscape

relationships.context: Frames talent wars as the main competitive battleground
Argues employees will become like athletes with concentrated power
Shrinking workforce creates competition for remaining talent
Fewer workers increases relative importance of each employee
Talent competition is a defining feature of future work dynamics
New talent tools justified by urgency of talent wars
